items.summary: Persist the uploaded spare-parts dataset and maintenance password across backend canister upgrades so that rebuilding/redeploying the same canister does not erase previously uploaded Excel data (subject to the existing 7-day retention logic).

Add a client-side backup/restore flow so a user can recover previously imported spare-parts data even if the draft app expires and the backend no longer has the dataset: (1) automatically save the last successfully imported dataset (the parsed SparePart array) into browser storage, (2) expose UI actions to download a local backup file (JSON) and to restore from the saved backup by re-uploading it to the backend after unlocking with the maintenance password.

Provide personal-use (self-managed) code and run instructions in-repo, including how to run locally, deploy to the Internet Computer with dfx, and how data persistence/backup works (including limitations of draft expiry vs live deployments). All user-facing documentation must be in English.
